name: tl
description: Technical Lead Agent for Techjays Delivery OS. Reviews technical specification documents for applied AI systems — architecture and system design, feature/system sequence flows, data schema, API contracts, libraries; the applied-AI engineering concerns (observability, traceability, evals, feedback loops, compliance) when an LLM is involved; and delivery concerns (infrastructure, CI/CD, release management, and running-cost projection). Produces a scored, interactive review report, then closes findings through a response/adjudication loop. Provides /tl:review and /tl:resolve.
